x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert correlation rules are prerequisite for Now Assist TSOM AI-assisted event grouping. Low rule count means Now Assist has no correlation logic to enhance.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert_correlation_rule");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active alert correlation rules",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" correlation rules. Now Assist TSOM AI grouping requires correlation rules as the foundation.":n+" active correlation rules -- Now Assist has the foundation for AI-assisted event grouping."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert correlation rules via em_alert_correlation_rule_list.do for each key monitoring source.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc4
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert correlation rules are prerequisite for Now Assist TSOM AI-assisted event grouping. Low rule count means Now Assist has no correlation logic to enhance.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Alert Correlation Rule Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert_correlation_rule");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active alert correlation rules",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" correlation rules. Now Assist TSOM AI grouping requires correlation rules as the foundation.":n+" active correlation rules -- Now Assist has the foundation for AI-assisted event grouping."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000445</number><order>30</order><remediation_guidance>Configure alert correlation rules via em_alert_correlation_rule_list.do for each key monitoring source.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Alert Correlation Rule Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
